ruleBasedEngines.name: Exercise Recommendation Engine
ruleBasedEngines.notes: Uses cleaned real exercise dataset. Suspicious records are excluded from recommendation outputs using config/exercise_blocklist.json.

ruleBasedEngines.name: Progressive Overload Engine
ruleBasedEngines.notes: Uses user workout history later. Manual cases are only for function tests.

ruleBasedEngines.name: Rest Day Suggestion Engine
ruleBasedEngines.notes: Uses recent workout history, soreness, fatigue, sleep, and planned rest days.

ruleBasedEngines.name: Calorie Burned Estimator

metMetadata.note: These values are used for MVP estimation only. They are not medical-grade measurements.

ruleBasedEngines.notes: Uses reviewed MET mappings. Estimates are approximate, not medical-grade measurements.

ruleBasedEngines.name: Streak Insight Engine
ruleBasedEngines.notes: Uses user habit logs later from the app.

ruleBasedEngines.name: Motivation Message Generator
ruleBasedEngines.notes: No LLM API. No ML. Short app-friendly coaching messages.

notes.dumbbell incline breeding: Appeared in real dataset but looks like a naming/data quality issue. Excluded from recommendations, not deleted from source dataset.

dataIntegrityRules: Use real datasets for AI/data work.
Do not use fake datasets for training or evaluation.
Manual examples are allowed only for controlled function tests.
Keep suspicious raw records for traceability, but filter them from user-facing recommendations.
